name: French Potato Salad with Bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the 9 New potatoes (1 lb.) and quarter them. Place in a kettle of cold salted water. Bring to a boil, then cook until tender but still firm for about 8-10 minutes after reaching a boil.
2. Meanwhile, chop the Bacon and sauté in a small skillet until crisp. Remove and reserve.
3. In the bacon fat, sauté the finely chopped shallots until tender but not browned, about 5 minutes. Reserve the shallots and fat.
4. When the potatoes are done, drain them and add to a mixing bowl.
5. Pour the red wine vinegar, olive oil, reserved shallots, and bacon fat over the hot potatoes. Season with salt and pepper to taste, then gently toss. Add chopped purple onion and parsley, tossing again. Cool to room temperature, cover, and refrigerate.
6. Before serving, bring the salad back to room temperature, toss, correct seasonings if needed, and add additional oil and vinegar if the salad seems dry. Sprinkle reserved bacon on top.
